preamble: Labiodentalization of bilabial fricative [ɸ] to labiodental fricative [f], a common historical shift in many language families.

languageExamples.note: Common transition from bilabial to labiodental fricatives as seen in the history of Indo-European languages.

sources: Ladefoged, P., & Maddieson, I. (1996). The Sounds of the World's Languages.
